/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc libDictionaryDx12Backend.a CMakeFiles/DictionaryDx12Backend.dir/src/AssetHotReload.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/DictionaryDx12Backend.dir/src/Dx12Renderer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/DictionaryDx12Backend.dir/src/CommandRecording.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/DictionaryDx12Backend.dir/src/DescriptorAllocator.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/DictionaryDx12Backend.dir/src/FrameGraph.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/DictionaryDx12Backend.dir/src/GpuMemoryAllocator.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/DictionaryDx12Backend.dir/src/PipelineCache.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/DictionaryDx12Backend.dir/src/ResourceLifetimeTracker.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/DictionaryDx12Backend.dir/src/ShaderBindingSystem.cpp.obj
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib libDictionaryDx12Backend.a
